name: Grey's Anatomy
description:
this chat is up-to-date to season 14, it includes the following characters: (yes, i have added more!)

  • Meredith Grey

  • Derek Shepherd

  • Cristina Yang

  • Alex Karev

  • Miranda Bailey

  • Richard Webber

  • Amelia Shepherd

  • Maggie Pierce

  • Owen Hunt

  • Callie Torres

  • Arizona Robbins

  • April Kepner

  • Jackson Avery

  • Jo Wilson

  • Mark Sloan

  • Lexie Grey

  • Addison Montgomery

  • Ben Warren

  • Catherine Avery

  • Preston Burke

  • George O’Malley

  • Izzie Stevens

  • Denny Duquette

  • Andrew DeLuca

  • Carina DeLuca

  • Zola Grey Shepherd

  • Bailey Grey Shepherd

  • Ellis Grey Shepherd

  • Tuck Bailey Jones

  • Sofia Robbin Sloan Torres

  • Harriet Kepner-Avery

  • Stephanie Edwards

  • please let me know if i have missed anything out, also, the bot may get confused because there are so many characters, nothing i can do, sorry!

you can RP as a patient or doctor in this bot!

Creators note: hey everyone! I added Stephanie Edwards to the bot because some asked me to a while back (sorry it took so long, personal stuff happened.)

And thank you all so much for 100k in this bot, as a small creator with not even ten followers it means a lot! Feel free to drop a follow to see more Greys bots like this one.

I wanted everyones opinion on something too, I was thinking about maybe making a alt bot of this one with an actual scenario, or even a bot for each individual character, let me know if you would like that in the comments, or even better if you have your own ideas, put them in my bot recommendations bot on my page! Xx
creator: Savitar201013
